description: Austin Federa and Mateo Ward discuss the concept of internet cartels and high-frequency trading, emphasizing the critical infrastructure of the internet and its vulnerabilities. They share insights from their backgrounds in telecommunications and networking, highlighting the challenges and innovations in building high-performance networks.
topic_summary: The episode explores the influence of internet cartels on connectivity and the implications for high-frequency trading. It features discussions on the founders' experiences in telecommunications and the development of advanced networking solutions, including the establishment of Double Zero.
